title: Mesynium australe
taxonomy: Mesynium australe is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It belongs to the subfamily Epidendroideae and is further classified into the tribe Cymbidieae. The genus Mesynium is part of the subtribe Cymbidiinae. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant. Further research may be needed to confirm and refine the classification of Mesynium australe.
